SEA-37 fix(client): resolve all 24 gosec security findings

* SEA-37 fix(client): resolve all 24 gosec security findings

- G115: cap bit shift to prevent integer overflow in rate limiting
- G306: tighten cert file permissions from 0644 to 0600
- G706: sanitize user input in 9 log statements to prevent log injection
- G104: handle 6 previously ignored errors (conn.Close, client.Stop, etc)
- G404: replace math/rand with crypto/rand for backoff jitter
- G304, G204, G703, G705: add nosec for validated false positives
  (embed.FS reads, validated domain paths, hardcoded paths, frpc binary)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* SEA-37 fix(client): use #nosec directive format for gosec suppressions

gosec requires `// #nosec` (with hash), not `// nosec`. Also add
#nosec G706 to sanitized log lines since gosec taint analysis can't
detect custom sanitizer functions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* SEA-37 fix(client): use %q format for last gosec G706 finding

%q quotes the string which prevents log injection without needing
a custom sanitizer that gosec taint analysis can't detect.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* SEA-37 fix(client): remove tainted name from static file error log

gosec G706 taint analysis can't be suppressed with #nosec for
taint-tracked rules. Simply omit the filename from the error log —
the error itself is sufficient for debugging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix build: upgrade Clerk, remove broken auth, lazy-load Convex

Build was failing due to:
1. Clerk v6.37 incompatible with Next.js 16 Turbopack (@clerk/backend/internal)
2. AI API route importing Clerk server auth (disabled anyway)
3. Convex client instantiated at build time without env vars

Fixes:
- Upgrade @clerk/nextjs to latest (v6.38+) for Turbopack compat
- Remove Clerk auth from /api/ai route (auth is disabled)
- Lazy-load ConvexHttpClient in /api/generate-report
- Fix UserButton prop change (afterSignOutUrl removed)

Build now succeeds: all 13 routes compile cleanly.

fix(tests/FAM/kill_pending_tasks): Force stop tasks that ignore cancellation

After the initial cancel/stop, wait 30s and check if tasks are still
pending. If so, escalate to bulk_stop (force), wait another 60s, and
verify again. Fail explicitly if tasks still cannot be stopped, rather
than silently showing their state.

commit.message:
Fix critical audit findings: RNG fairness, motherlode access, polling, shop

- C3: Fix operator RNG manipulation — add DEPLOY_PHASE_BLOCKS constant,
  targetBlock set at startRound(), closeDeploys() uses fixed block hash
  instead of letting operator shop for favorable blocks
- C4: withdrawMotherlode now onlyOwner + nonReentrant, sends to teamWallet
  instead of arbitrary operator-chosen address
- C5: Add mutex to createPoller preventing overlapping poll ticks
- C6: Stop game service in ServiceProvider init cleanup to prevent zombies
- C7: Shop deductBalance now burns DRILL on-chain via transfer to 0xdead
  instead of being a no-op in contract mode
- Update getRoundState to return targetBlock, update all ABIs + operator
- Update all Solidity tests for new deploy phase block advancement

commit.message:
Fix foto pipeline: 6 breekpunten opgelost van scanner tot products.json

A. github-sync dedup key: platform::name::condition (was platform::name)
   Voorkomt dat dual listings (Goed + Redelijke staat) elkaar overschrijven

B. Image URLs zonder timestamps in products.json
   Strip ?t=xxx bij opslag in add-product + github-sync normalisatie
   Voorkomt stale cached URLs die nooit updaten

C. imageCount afleiden uit werkelijke imageUrls keys
   Niet meer vertrouwen op client-input voor image count

D. v2 cache invalidatie retry bij upload-image
   Als eerste delete faalt, retry 1x — oude cached foto is erger dan 200ms

E. Image existence check bij github-sync
   Valideer dat image blob keys bestaan, null-out ontbrekende images
   Producten zonder werkende foto krijgen null zodat shop geen 404 toont

F. product-image Sharp fallback
   Als Sharp optimalisatie crasht, serveer origineel (beter dan 404)

v2.21.4 bundled Go 1.23.1 which can't parse go.mod requiring Go 1.26.
v2.24.0+ added Go 1.26 support.

Co-authored-by: seawiseinc <seawiseinc@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 7z VFS provider ignores configured exe path, fails on Windows

SevenZipVfsProvider.Initialize() only tried PATH candidates (7z/7za/7zz),
never the user-configured path from Options → Configuration.
On Windows, 7-Zip lives in C:\Program Files\7-Zip\ which is not on PATH,
so _exe stayed null and CanHandle returned false → "No VFS provider found".

- Add constructor parameter configuredPath to SevenZipVfsProvider
- Initialize() tries configuredPath first, then PATH, then the default
  Windows install location as a last resort
- Pass settings.SevenZipPath from AppSetup
- Improve EnsureInstalled() error message to mention the settings field

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Scanner v3: foto pipeline fixes, dual listings, gradient BG, 268 games DB

Phase 1 (Foto Pipeline):
- Back-pairing threshold 0.40→0.28 + partial productcode matching
- Image semaphore leak fix (try/finally pattern)
- compressImage: resize-first approach (2000→1400→1000px steps, then quality loop)
- Lightweight push protection (refuse push if no full-res available)
- Gradient-aware flood fill: follows gradual BG color changes (wooden desks, etc.)
- Quality gate: block auto-push for qualityScore < 25 (blurry photos)

Phase 2 (Scanner):
- Dual condition listings: GB/GBC/GBA/N64 cartridges auto-create "Redelijke staat" variant at 70% price
- Retry-After header parsing from Anthropic 429/503 responses + exponential backoff
- Parallel scanners: mobile 10, desktop 14 (was 6/10)
- Image semaphore: mobile 15, desktop 20 (was 10/15)

commit.message:
Fix review comments: eliminate duplicate response logic and fix edge cases

- H-1: Extract status resolution and Retry-After formatting into
  AccessDeniedResponseAttributes utility in spring-core; eliminate
  duplicate instanceof checks and DateTimeFormatter calls from all
  12 response classes across webmvc and webflux
- H-2: Move retryAfterInstant logic from ScheduleEvaluationStep and
  ReactiveScheduleEvaluationStep into Schedule.retryAfterInstant(Clock)
- M-1: Return null from Schedule.retryAfterInstant when start is in the
  past to avoid sending stale Retry-After hints to clients
- M-2: Fix HtmlResponseBuilder to use a dynamic <title> tag matching
  the HTTP status (Service Temporarily Unavailable for 503)
- L-1: Add timezone-aware retryAfter test to ReactiveScheduleEvaluationStepTest
- L-2: Add EndpointGateAspectScheduleIntegrationTest and schedule
  controller for webflux 503 / Retry-After coverage

* docs(auth): implementation plan — 7 phase tickets for access redesign [#1020]

Self-contained phase plans with BDD acceptance criteria, file maps,
and context references so any agent can pick up and implement.

Phase 1: Entity restructuring + entitlements (foundation)
Phase 2: Plans + limits + billing foundations
Phase 3: Overrides + advanced limits
Phase 4: Versioning + grandfathering
Phase 5: Billing integration (Stripe)
Phase 6: Cloud storage + data residency
Phase 7: Client-side + UI components

ticket-system rules from backstage to vertz repo.

commit.message:
refactor: restructure Application layer to mirror Domain DDD bounded contexts

- Rename Accounts → Identity (mirrors Domain.Identity)
- Merge Roles + Permissions → AccessControl (mirrors Domain.AccessControl)
- Rename Tokens → TokenManagement (mirrors Domain.TokenManagement)
- Move AssignRoleToUser command to Identity context (mutates Account aggregate)
- Move AuditAI concrete implementations to Infrastructure/AI/V3/
- Add missing V3 implementations: AgenticRAGService, MultiHopRetriever, ConfidenceScorer
- Add missing V3 implementations: AuditAgentV3, AgentState, StateGraph, all nodes, AgentTracer
- Register full V3 agentic pipeline in AiExtensions DI
- Add PermissionCreatedEventHandler and PermissionDeletedEventHandler
- Move RoleSettings to AccessControl/Settings, AppClaimTypes to Common/Security
- Fix phantom Common.DTOs namespace → SharedKernel.Common.DTOs
- Remove dead code: empty interfaces, commented-out mapping profile, duplicate RoleCreatedEvent

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: external editor/viewer launch broken on Windows (used /bin/sh)

LaunchExternalProgram was routing through ProcessHelper.RunDetached
which calls /bin/sh -c "..." — doesn't exist on Windows, fails silently.

Rewrite to use ProcessHelper.TryLaunchArgs (direct ProcessStartInfo) which
works on both platforms. Also handles:
- Quoted paths: "C:\Program Files\prog.exe" flags
- Absolute paths with spaces: treated as single executable (no quoting needed)
- Commands with flags: code --wait, gedit --new-window
- Error dialog if the launch fails instead of silent failure

fix(mcp): add PID file management for stale instance recovery (#59)

When the MCP server crashes or is killed without clean shutdown, the
next startup attempt can fail due to stale state. Add PID file
management to detect and clean up stale instances automatically.

- Write PID to ~/.ouroboros/mcp-server.pid on startup
- Clean up PID file on shutdown (via try/finally)
- Detect stale PIDs on startup using os.kill(pid, 0)
- Add actionable recovery steps in error messages

Closes #59
